title: Spiral seed shield and spear
wikitext:
[]: Spiral, seed, shield and spear             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sun May 31, 2009 1:25 am This might be a bit spacy, so bear with me, but isn't it neat how, taking away even the religious names that provide surface-level symbolic flair, these four things are the most primal. You have the spiral form, which is the series' given reason for possibly infinite energy supplies and life, and then you have seeds (of life) equipped with (AT) fields. Then another ancestral race saw it fit to introduce a spear that could pierce the shield, for some reason. just thought that was neat.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 31, 2009 9:05 pm They all start with "s". Other than that, I'm not sure what you're getting at.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Mon Jun 01, 2009 4:26 pm I think I get it. These are some basic symbols of the series, and (if not necessarily Jungian or mythic) are low level concepts. The use of low level concepts might contribute to the show's popularity (but that's another thread). They can be seen to relate to procreation - spear, shield, seed, spiral (in the DNA context, at least, if not quite on the same level as the others). Certainly there is more archtypal/procreation stuff that's been talked about here (spear - obvious; dummy plug lowering into womb - not as much). Some of it is rather superficial (names and whatnot), while others are repeated. But there does seem to be a good dose of symbology beyond the window dressing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 01, 2009 4:32 pm I sorta see what you're getting at. Interesting stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 01, 2009 8:06 pm I don't see any particular significance to the four items chosen. It seems like a rather arbitrary and artificial way to approach the symbology, unless there's some hidden pattern I'm missing.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue Jun 02, 2009 1:49 pm For me, spear/shield is rather primal militant/weapon/sex stuff. Seed and spiral hit another level of intellectualism somewhat above primal symbols. Spear/piercing/dummy plug/tree-of-life-thing-that-01-becomes as it descends into GNR's forehead. Spear/penis penetration of ATF shield in battle/sex, penetration/"little death", sex/battle, sex/non-loneliness/mindrape...surely there's a glimmer of interconnection. At least that's what I get from the OP.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jun 06, 2009 8:39 pm VoidEater wrote: For me, spear/shield is rather primal militant/weapon/sex stuff. Seed and spiral hit another level of intellectualism somewhat above primal symbols. Spear/piercing/dummy plug/tree-of-life-thing-that-01-becomes as it descends into GNR's forehead. Spear/penis penetration of ATF shield in battle/sex, penetration/"little death", sex/battle, sex/non-loneliness/mindrape...surely there's a glimmer of interconnection.
